description: You are an investigative data journalist researching federal government spending using USASpending.gov. Your editor has assigned you a story about federal contract spending by the Department of Defense (DOD) for fiscal year 2023. Download a CSV containing at least 100 rows of DOD contract search results for FY2023 to ~/Downloads/. Identify the total contract spending, total grant spending, and the top 3 recipient companies by award amount for FY2023 from the DOD spending profile, cross-referencing at least one data point with FPDS-NG (fpds.gov) or Data.gov. Create a research notes file at ~/Documents/dod_spending_research.txt containing the total DOD contract spending (in billions), the names of the top 3 contractors, the URLs of at least 2 data sources used, and a 2-3 sentence summary of your findings. Bookmark at least 3 pages from usaspending.gov in a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Government Spending Research'.
